name: Cmd+K search across jobs, clients, invoices
description: User uses the topbar search to jump directly to a record by name or invoice number. The search should be fast, keyboard-first, and span entity types.

persona.name: Diego Martínez
persona.context: Customer just called about an invoice. Diego is on the dashboard and wants to pull up the record without clicking around.

preconditions: There is at least one invoice with the suffix '-0042'

steps.expect: Search input gets focus; results panel opens
Top hit is the Patel client; secondary hits show Patel's quotes/invoices grouped by type

steps.action: Presses ↓ then Enter on an invoice hit
steps.expect: Navigates straight to that invoice page
Numeric/identifier search resolves the matching invoice as the top hit
Panel closes and focus returns to where it was

evaluationCriteria.check: Result groups have clear icons or labels per entity type
First keystroke shows results in <150ms on a warm cache
Diacritics are tolerant — 'O'Brien' matches 'obrien' and 'O Brien'
Results expose role=listbox / role=option with aria-selected on the active item
